---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for SG Church
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Are there alternative approaches you've considered? -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Provide specific examples of how this feature would be used -->

1. **Use Case 1**: Description
2. **Use Case 2**: Description

## User Stories
<!-- Optional: Write user stories in the format "As a [role], I want [feature] so that [benefit]" -->

- As a **Church Admin**, I want **feature** so that **benefit**
- As a **Member**, I want **feature** so that **benefit**

## Mockups / Examples
<!-- Add mockups, screenshots from other tools, or examples if available -->

## Benefits
<!-- What value does this feature provide? -->

- **For Churches**:
- **For Members**:
- **For Admins**:

## Technical Considerations
<!-- Optional: Any technical aspects to consider? -->

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Critical - Blocks adoption
- [ ] High - Significantly improves usability
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Future enhancement

## Affected Modules
<!-- Which modules would this feature impact? -->
- [ ] Membership
- [ ] Finance
- [ ] Events
- [ ] LMS (Learning)
- [ ] Sacraments
- [ ] Communications
- [ ] Admin/Settings
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Church Size
<!-- Would this feature be useful for churches of certain sizes? -->
- [ ] Small (< 100 members)
- [ ] Medium (100-500 members)
- [ ] Large (500+ members)
- [ ] All sizes

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other information that might be helpful -->

## Willingness to Contribute
<!-- Would you be willing to help implement this feature? -->
- [ ] I can submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with design/mockups
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide feedback
- [ ] I cannot contribute but would love to see this
